servinfo.title: Water Pump / Generator Drive Belt Tension Inspection and Adjustment

s1.ptxt: Inspect water pump / generator drive belt for cracks, cuts, deformation, wear and cleanliness. If it is necessary to replace water pump / generator drive belt, refer to Water Pump / Generator Drive Belt Removal and Installation .
Check water pump / generator drive belt for tension. Water pump / generator drive belt is in proper tension when it deflects as follows under thumb pressure (about 100 N (10.2 kgf, 22.5 lbf)).
If belt tension is not as specified, go to next steps.

spec-sdm.sdm-title: Water pump / generator drive belt tension

sdm1.sdm-value: 4.5 – 5.5 mm (0.18 – 0.22 in.) as deflection / 100 N (10.2 kgf, 22.5 lbf)
sdm1.sdm-ptxt: between Water pump pulley and Generator pulley

sdm1.sdm-value: 4.0 – 4.5 mm (0.16 – 0.18 in.) as deflection / 100 N (10.2 kgf, 22.5 lbf)
sdm1.sdm-ptxt: between Water pump pulley and Generator pulley

s1.ptxt: Loosen generator pivot bolt (1) using specified tool.
Loosen generator adjusting arm bolts (1) and then adjust belt tension to specification described at step 3) by loosening / tightening generator adjusting bolt (2).
Tighten generator adjusting arm bolts to specified torque.
Tighten generator pivot bolt according to the following procedure.

s2.ptxt: Calculate reading value of torque wrench (M) by formula.

spec.title: Formula for reading value of torque wrench.

item.ptxt: (M): Reading value using extension special tool
T (50 N·m (5.1 kgf-m, 37.0 lbf-ft)): Specified torque
“a” (0.05 m (1.96 in.)): Dimension of special tool

s2.ptxt: Tighten generator pivot bolt (1) to reading value of torque wrench using special tool.

s1.ptxt: Check belt tension for specification after turning crankshaft two rotations clockwise.
Tighten generator adjusting bolt (1) to specified torque
